title: poa media subsp. ursina
intro: Poa media subsp. ursina, also known as Ursa Grass or Mountain Poa, is a subspecies of the Poa media plant, a type of grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Poa media subsp. ursina include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially reducing the severity of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Poa media subsp. ursina can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health benefits.
